prompt: I have about 20 meeting notes scattered across my vault — some in 2-Areas/work/, some in 2-Areas/personal/, some just sitting in the root. They're all tagged #meeting. I want to consolidate them all into a new meetings/ folder. Walk me through the exact CLI commands to find all of them and move them without breaking any wikilinks that point to those notes.
assertions: Uses 'obsidian tag tag="#meeting"' (or similar correct syntax) to find notes by tag
Uses 'format=paths' to get file paths suitable for looping/scripting
Uses 'obsidian move file=... to=...' to move files (not shell mv or cp)
Mentions or explains that 'obsidian move' auto-updates wikilinks (unlike shell mv)
Provides a loop or scripted pattern to move all matching files, not just a single example
CLI parameter style is param=value, not --param
